## AnchorNode class

An AST node that anchors a pattern to the start, end, or both ends of input.

**Signature:**

```typescript
export declare class AnchorNode extends RegexNode 
```
**Extends:** [RegexNode](./pattern-builder.regexnode.md)

## Example


```ts
new AnchorNode(new TextNode("foo"), "both").toString(); // "^foo$"
```
